case_title: AWOKE, TESFA VS HILTON SAN FRANCISCO & TOWERS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILTON  SAN FRANCISCO & TOWERS NO APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY AWOKE, TESFA AS TO DEFENDANT HILTON  SAN FRANCISCO & TOWERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL TO ANY AUTH AGENT FOR PROCESS OF SERVICE HILTON MANAGEMENT, THE S.F. TOWER RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-31-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PER PLFT'S REQUEST. POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ SETL, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 9/11/00 AT 1:30PM CT WILL DISM ACTION W/PREJ.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
